reviews.comment:
Institución centenaria de la Republica Argentina . Un verdadero valor agregado en la ruta y durante un viaje. Importantes descuentos para socios en alojamiento y combustible además de auxilio y asistencia mecánica en ruta las 24 horas todos los dias y en todo el país.

(Translated by Google)
A century-old institution in the Republic of Argentina. A true added value on the road and during your trip. Significant discounts for members on lodging and fuel, plus 24/7 roadside assistance and mechanical support throughout the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbTk2b3R3RRAB
